articles.description: Amid rising tensions in West Asia, External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar emphasised the importance of direct talks with Iran to reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz. He says his ongoing discussions yield promising results for shipping and global energy stability.

articles.title: No Eid celebrations for Shias in MP in the wake of Khamenei's death in the Iran-Iraq War
articles.description: "Around 4,000 Shia families are living in Madhya Pradesh. We will not wear new clothes or celebrate Eid this year as we are saddened by Khamenei's death. We will only offer namaz," says All India Shia Samaj State president

topStories.title: Trump Leaves Allies And Foes Guessing On Endgame For Iran
topStories.description: As the US-Israeli war on Iran enters its third week, pressure is growing on the person in the best position to end it: Donald Trump.

topStories.title: ‘President Trump is reaching out’: US hints at seeking India's help to secure Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: US energy secretary Chris Wright claimed that Donald Trump told him about some countries which have "committed to aiding the United States”.

topStories.title: Trump Says He Wants To Finish Iran War Before Tackling Cuba
topStories.description: US President Donald Trump predicted Cuba wants to make a deal with the US but said he wants to finish the war with Iran before turning his attention to the communist island nation.

topStories.title: Large protest held in London against US-Israeli war on Iran
topStories.description: Thousands of demonstrators took to the streets of London to oppose US-Israeli aggression against Iran, Lebanon and Gaza.

topStories.title: 19 Indians arrested in UAE for posting ‘misleading content’ online amid US-Iran war
topStories.description: The latest list names 25 people, including 17 Indians. This is separate from the 10 people, including two Indians, who were ordered to be arrested on Saturday.

topStories.title: Silver drops over Rs 4,000/kg, gold falls to Rs 1.56 lakh as rising oil prices dent rate cut bets. Check key levels to track today
topStories.description: Gold and silver opened sharply lower on MCX Monday as soaring energy prices dampened hopes of near-term U.S. rate cuts. MCX April gold fell Rs 1,811 to Rs 1,56,655/10g, while May silver dropped Rs 4,335 to Rs 2,55,101/kg. Rising oil prices and inflation are keeping precious metals under pressure, with futures expected to weaken further amid geopolitical uncertainty.

topStories.title: Stars at Oscars 2026 call for end to war in Gaza and Iran
topStories.description: Actors and filmmakers spoke out at the Oscars 2026  in Los Angeles against the US-Israeli war on Iran and the genocide.

topStories.title: Nobody wants to get involved’ in Strait of Hormuz military operations
topStories.description: Charles Kupchan says the US and allies are reluctant to use military means to safeguard the Strait of Hormuz.

topStories.title: Oil prices keep rising as Trump seeks coalition to reopen Strait of Hormuz
topStories.description: Brent crude tops $106 a barrel as markets see no end in sight to the halt of traffic through the critical waterway.

topStories.title: US-Israeli strike pounds city of Hamadan, Iran
topStories.description: Footage shows huge plumes of smoke from a US-Israeli strike on Hamadan, Iran.

topStories.title: Strait of Hormuz trade to resume soon? Trump admin likely to announce coalition to escort ships amid fuel price rise
topStories.description: The development comes amid a spiralling global energy crisis precipitated by the halt in trade through the Strait of Hormuz, with rising gas prices also affecting the US as well, where Trump faces mid-term polls later in the year.

dailyNews.description: An Arizona man accused of crucifying a pastor requested the death penalty, saying he wants the case to end quickly and has never claimed to be innocent.

dailyNews.description: The UConn Huskies women's basketball team is undefeated and was named the No. 1 overall seed of the NCAA Women's Basketball Tournament on Sunday night.

dailyNews.title: CNN liberal panelist argues billions spent on defense should go to health insurance instead
dailyNews.description: CNN panelists debate U.S. priorities as Leigh McGowan questions whether spending on the Iran conflict should instead go toward addressing healthcare challenges at home.

dailyNews.description: Actor and comedian Wayne Brady got involved in an All Elite Wrestling match on Sunday night, slapping wrestler Shane Taylor across the face in Los Angeles.

dailyNews.title: Woman accused of fatal hit-and-run that killed 8-year-old laughs during first court appearance
dailyNews.description: A Florida woman accused in a fatal hit-and-run was seen laughing during a court hearing as the judge read charges for an 8-year-old boy's death in the Winter Haven crash incident.

dailyNews.title: Penn's TJ Power takes advantage of massive Yale blunder to punch ticket to March Madness
dailyNews.description: Penn stunned Yale, 88-84, in overtime to claim the Ivy League title after the Bulldogs' costly blunder that allowed the Quakers a chance to tie the game late.

dailyNews.description: The Georgia Bulldogs escaped with a win over the Tennessee Volunteers on Sunday as Cole Johnson robbed Stone Lawless' go-ahead home run.

dailyNews.description: The NCAA selection committee released the 68 teams that will fight for a Division I men's basketball championship on Sunday with the Duke Blue Devils named the No. 1 overall seed.

topStories.description: The planned vote to close the center for renovations was listed on an agenda circulated to the center’s board of trustees on Sunday, less than a day before the meeting.

dailyNews.description: The email solicitation to benefit Trump’s PAC also offers donors “private national security briefings.”

dailyNews.title: Trump calls for other nations to help reopen Strait of Hormuz
dailyNews.description: President Trump’s call for help to reopen the Strait of Hormuz has so far gone unanswered. On Truth Social, the president listed China, France, Japan, South Korea, the U.K. as countries he hopes would help. It comes as Trump tells NBC News that Iran is ready to negotiate a ceasefire. NBC News’ Raf Sanchez has the latest.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'
dailyNews.description: Trump says military targets on Iranian island 'obliterated'

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.
